name: Morphtronic Clocken
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディフォーマー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>・クロックン
desc: ● While in Attack Position: This card gains 500 ATK for each Morph Counter on it. ● While in Defense Position: Once per turn, you can place 1 Morph Counter on this card. You can Tribute this card to inflict 1000 damage to your opponent for each Morph Counter on it.
mnst_eff: ● While in Attack Position: This card gains 500 ATK for each Morph Counter on it. ● While in Defense Position: Once per turn, you can place 1 Morph Counter on this card. You can Tribute this card to inflict 1000 damage to your opponent for each Morph Counter on it.
